🧹 Nitpick comments (2)
lib/harness/phase.py (1) `123-128`: _🧹 Nitpick_ | _🟡 Minor_ **Tighten the dry-run gate message.** The current message is fine but reads a bit verbose; consider trimming.
lib/harness/tests/test_merge_dry_run_rerun.py (1) `42-44`: _🧹 Nitpick_ | _🟡 Minor_ **Use parametrize for the two near-identical assertions.** Minor stylistic improvement.
